free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of 14.7 MeV deuterons
and of 29.4 MeV alpha-particles by 6Li and 7Li
presentation of data on 6,7Li(alpha,el) and inelastic
data of 6Li(alpha,inl) with Elvl=2.18 MeV and
7Li(alpha,inl) with Elvl=4.63 MeV are given. Also, the
details of the target preparation were presented.
Self-supported 6Li and 7Li targets were prepared by
The absolute cross sections obtained were also checked
by measuring the elastic scattering cross sections of
100 um (50 um) thick transmission (delta-E) counter of
solid state detector and the 1000 um (500 um) thick
forward angles were detected only with a 500 micr.
No information about source of uncertainty
